rows.label: qev085104_MSG0001
rows.name: It's not the aliens from that time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085104_MSG0002
rows.name:
You're right.
They're different from those two from the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085104_MSG0003
rows.name: Earthlings?! Why are they in a place like this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085104_MSG0004
rows.name:
It doesn't matter.
Slaughter them all while we're at it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085104_MSG0006
rows.name: We have no choice but to fight.[ST:wait ]
